title: sarcanthus cerinus
intro: Sarcanthus cerinus, also known as the yellow gentian, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve indigestion, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Sarcanthus cerinus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders.
